meta.title: Vesta — Family life across countries, languages, and generations
meta.description: The AI-native family app for households that live across countries, languages, and generations. Built for expat families first. Join the waitlist for private beta.
meta.ogTitle: Vesta — Family life across countries, languages, and generations
meta.ogDescription: The AI-native family app for households that live across countries, languages, and generations. Built for expat families first.

hero.headline: Modern family life is more than one head can hold.
hero.subhead: The AI-powered family app that carries your family's mental load, so no one carries it alone.
hero.noSpam: No spam. No selling your data to anyone, ever.

s2.heading: It almost always falls on one person.

s3.heading: What a week actually looks like.

s4.heading: Four ideas that shape every screen.

s5.heading: Built for families that don't fit in one country.

s6.heading: GDPR by design. Your data, yours alone.

cta.heading: Be first into Vesta.
cta.body: Private beta opens to early waitlist members later in 2026. Tell us where you are and we'll prioritise beta invites accordingly.

footer.tagline: Vesta — named after the Roman goddess of home and family.
